column1: All 66 books of the Literal Standard Version of the Holy Bible, a major revision of Young's Literal Translation, completed in 2020.
99 books of the 2024 Expanded Edition of The Complete Apocrypha.

Via digital access key included with every purchase, the Book of Jasher and all 44 books of Ancient Historia, the groundbreaking, contemporary translation of key works of Josephus and Eusebius, presenting a comprehensive historical companion to the Bible from the time of creation all the way to AD 325.
Extensive companion materials, including additional apocryphal fragments, resources, writings, charts, maps, and a glossary explaining nearly 200 key terms and characters in the biblical narrative.

Featuring nearly 200 videos from various scholars, animators, and worship artists. Scan a QR code to quickly watch content directly related to what you are reading. See Moses at the Burning Bush, watch as Samson defeats 1,000 Philistines, worship with many of the Psalms, and experience what it may have been like for the Disciples as they followed in the footsteps of Jesus.
66 books of the Holy Bible and 99 books of The Complete Apocrypha in print.
Jasher and Ancient Historia (45 books) via digital access key.
Contemporary English throughout, translated with formal equivalence.
A handsome, three-column layout with elegant, easy-to-read, 10-pt serif throughout.
Lay-flat design with heavy-weight paper for highlighting and minimal bleed-through.
Extensive companion materials, including charts, maps, apologetics, additional writings, a nearly 200-word glossary, and nearly 200 accompanying videos.
